subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Beauty hath turned His countenance toward thee from this glorious horizon, and the servant, present before the Throne, hath indeed desired thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه الیک وجه القدم من هذا المنظر الکریم قد اراد العبد الحاضر لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the power of words; of speech
